active_event.title: OpenStack Flex | DFW3, SJC3 | February 26, 2026
active_event.details: Rackspace will be performing a Service Disrupting maintenance in our DFW3, SJC3 data centers between February 25, 2026 20:00 and February 26, 2026 08:00 CT (between February 26, 2026 02:00 and February 26, 2026 14:00 UTC). During this maintenance, customers may notice up to one minute of network connectivity loss. As always, your Support Team will be available by phone to assist you.
